channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Qantas reduces domestic flight schedule as jet fuel prices surge
item.description: Qantas, Australia’s national airline, has announced a significant reduction in its domestic flight services across the country, citing soaring jet fuel costs and ongoing global pressures linked to the...

item.title: Mayo Clinic Press: Genetic Testing Information Unavailable
item.description: This news article isn't a standard news piece; it's an error message encountered when attempting to access a specific resource on the Mayo Clinic Press website. The attempt to view an article titled '...

item.title: Sergeant Nkosi to face June trial for alleged evidence tampering in Limpopo cash‑in‑transit case
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) in Limpopo has confirmed that Sergeant Fannie Nkosi will stand trial in June over allegations that he tampered with police dockets linked to a major cash‑in‑tr...

item.title: CM Stalin campaigns door-to-door in Vellore ahead of Tamil Nadu assembly elections
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M K Stalin has actively started his campaign for the forthcoming assembly elections by visiting Vellore in a door-to-door outreach programme. During his visits, he interacted...

item.title: Montreal Port Faces Leadership Changes Amid Executive Departures
item.description: The Montreal Port Authority is experiencing a significant leadership shake-up, raising concerns about its governance and future direction. Barely a week after CEO Julie Gascon unexpectedly resigned, t...

item.title: Nakuru's Night Economy Struggles Four Years After City Status
item.description: Nakuru, Kenya, a city that recently attained city status, is grappling with a significant decline in its nightlife scene, impacting the local economy and altering the character of the area. Once a vib...

item.title: Ex-bagman claims Mans Carpio asked help to fix magnetic lifter case linked to missing shabu
item.description: Ramil Madriaga, a man who allegedly served as the former bagman of Vice President Sara Duterte, testified before the House justice committee that Sara’s husband, Mans Carpio, once sought his assistanc...

item.title: Family of Megan Gallagher speaks after conviction of seven individuals involved in her death
item.description: In Saskatoon, the family of Megan Gallagher delivered their final statements in court following the conviction of seven individuals connected to her death. The emotional testimony focused on the immen...

item.title: Analysis of Increasing Hate Speech and Its Impact on Indian Society
item.description: In 2025, India witnessed a troubling rise in hate speech incidents, with the Centre for the Study of Organized Hate reporting 1,318 events targeting religious minorities across 21 states, one union te...

item.title: How a Kenyan entrepreneur turned snail farming into a profitable business
item.description: Back in 2017, Roussoss Demisse first saw snails as pests invading his mushroom farm in Kenya. Initially planning to get rid of them, he discovered through research that in West Africa, snails were act...

item.title: KSE-100 Recovers Sharply After Previous Day’s Plunge Amid Global Oil and Geopolitical Concerns
item.description: On Tuesday, the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) witnessed a strong rebound, with the benchmark KSE-100 index surging by more than 5,000 points following a turbulent session a day earlier. The index rose...

item.title: Kenya Ports Authority wins tribunal case over contested Sh1.3bn tender
item.description: The Public Procurement Administrative Review Board (PPARB) has ruled in favour of the Kenya Ports Authority (KPA) in a high-stakes tender row worth Sh1.3 billion involving a Finnish company. The dispu...

item.title: Nigeria and Morocco Set to Finalise $25bn Gas Pipeline Deal Before Year End
item.description: According to Morocco’s hydrocarbons and mining agency (ONHYM), Nigeria and Morocco plan to sign the long-awaited intergovernmental agreement (IGA) for the African Atlantic Gas Pipeline within 2026. Th...

item.title: Johannesburg placed on financial watch amid concerns over delayed statements and service delivery risks
item.description: Johannesburg has been placed on a negative financial watch by Global Credit Rating (GCR) after the city failed to submit audited financial statements on time, raising serious concerns about its financ...

item.title: Club Rose Bay renovation shifts focus from veterans to younger patrons
item.description: Residents in Sydney’s eastern suburbs are expressing frustration over the recent revamp of the Rose Bay RSL, managed by hospitality entrepreneur Justin Hemmes’ Merivale group. Traditionally a venue fo...

item.title: Bunnings and Kmart owner removes delivery fees amid fuel crisis to support customers
item.description: A major Australian retail group that owns well-known chains such as Bunnings and Kmart has announced it will scrap delivery fees as part of a broader response to ongoing pressures linked to a fuel cri...

item.title: PM Modi greets Vice-President Radhakrishnan on the occasion of Puthandu
item.description: On April 14, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi visited Vice-President C.P. Radhakrishnan at his official residence in New Delhi to extend greetings on the occasion of Tamil New Year, known as Puthand...

item.title: Infinity Hills Project Enters Construction Phase After Full Compensation in Zanzibar
item.description: Demolition work has officially started at Kikwajuni in Zanzibar for the Infinity Hills project, marking a major step forward after all compensation payments to former residents were completed. The dev...

item.title: Inquest hears earlier treatment may have saved woman who died of sepsis in Ontario hospital
item.description: An inquest into the 2021 death of 24-year-old Heather Winterstein has heard expert testimony suggesting her life may have been saved if she had received earlier treatment at a St. Catharines, Ontario ...

item.title: United Airlines CEO reportedly discussed potential merger with American Airlines with U.S. officials
item.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby has reportedly raised the idea of a potential combination between United Airlines and American Airlines with multiple U.S. government officials, according to sources fa...
